review_notes: The functions accurately map to the encryption requirements of PCI DSS 3.5.1.2 by ensuring that sensitive data such as secrets and etcd data are encrypted at rest in Kubernetes. The function names are descriptive, specific, and follow the naming conventions. However, it is important to ensure that the encryption configurations are properly implemented and verified within the Kubernetes environment.
title: Requirement 3.5.1.2
step1_reasoning: The control 3.5.1.2 focuses on ensuring encryption for workgroup data in cloud services. In Kubernetes, this translates to ensuring that sensitive data such as secrets and etcd data are encrypted at rest. Kubernetes provides mechanisms to encrypt secrets and etcd data, which align with the encryption requirements of the control.
